## Checklist

- [ ] Diff contains no unrelated changes or generated artifacts
- [ ] New and changed behavior is tested
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, keys, or real environment files are included
- [ ] Commit/PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Breaking changes are explicit
- [ ] Dependent PRs and merge order are documented
